customers_say: Customers find this water purifier to be the best in the market, appreciating its premium appearance and excellent taste. The installation process is free of cost, and customers consider it a budget-friendly option with no AMC or hidden costs. The water quality receives positive feedback, with one customer noting the TDS value is below 100. While many customers report excellent working performance, some mention issues with the machine not working properly.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Best product in best price
reviews.body: Excellent product and best service by UC professional. The best part is their 2 years unlimited warranty on the entire product and no service cost for 2 years.
